# elements

**Instance Property**

An array of asset, text, or journal entry elements contained in the content.

## Declaration

```swift
var elements: [PHProjectElement] { get }
```

## Determining Content Properties

- **numberOfColumns**: The number of columns if section content is displayed in a grid layout.
- **aspectRatio**: The aspect ratio of the full content layout, defined as width over height.
- **cloudAssetIdentifiers**: An array containing all cloud asset identifiers referenced in the content.
- **backgroundColor**: The background color of the section content when created from an Apple Print Product.
